moments.title: Wimbledon Finals Weekend
moments.blurb: The final matches of the 2026 Wimbledon Championships are taking place this weekend at the All England Club in London.

angles.name: Men's Final Anticipation
angles.copy: Who will lift the Gentlemen's Singles trophy tomorrow? The Wimbledon final is set to be a classic! #Wimbledon

angles.name: Women's Final Today
angles.copy: It's Women's Singles Final day at Wimbledon! Who are you backing for glory on Centre Court? #WimbledonFinal

moments.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 Final
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 tournament, co-hosted by USA, Canada, and Mexico, culminates with the final match on Sunday, July 19th.

angles.name: Final Countdown
angles.copy: Only 8 days until the FIFA World Cup 2026 Final! Who are you hoping to see battle it out for football's biggest prize?

angles.name: World Cup Buzz
angles.copy: The excitement is building for the World Cup final next Sunday. Has your team made it to the last two?

moments.title: The Open Championship Begins
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship, golf's oldest major, takes place at Royal Birkdale Golf Club from July 16-19, with practice days starting July 12.

angles.name: Golf Major Alert
angles.copy: Get ready for some world-class golf! The Open Championship kicks off next week at Royal Birkdale. Who's your pick for the Claret Jug?

angles.name: Royal Birkdale Hosts
angles.copy: The eyes of the golf world turn to Southport next week as Royal Birkdale hosts The Open Championship. Are you heading down to see the action?

moments.title: Kaleidoscope Festival Today
moments.blurb: Kaleidoscope Festival is happening today, July 11th, at Alexandra Palace Park in London, featuring a diverse lineup of music and arts.

angles.name: Live in London
angles.copy: If you're in London, Kaleidoscope Festival is ON today at Ally Pally! Who are you excited to see?

angles.name: Festival Vibes
angles.copy: Sunshine and live music! Kaleidoscope Festival is bringing the good vibes to Alexandra Palace Park today.

moments.title: Lost Minds Festival Kicks Off
moments.blurb: Lost Minds Festival is taking place today, July 11th, in Newcastle, promising a day of electronic music and immersive experiences.

angles.name: Newcastle Party
angles.copy: Lost Minds Festival is happening today in Newcastle! Get ready for an epic day of beats and good times.

angles.name: Dance Music Alert
angles.copy: Calling all ravers! Lost Minds Festival is delivering the biggest dance anthems today. What tracks are you hoping to hear?

moments.title: Boogietown Festival Today
moments.blurb: Boogietown Festival is live today, July 11th, in London, offering a lineup of disco, funk, and house music.

angles.name: London Groove
angles.copy: Get your groove on! Boogietown Festival is bringing the funk and disco to London today. Who's there?

angles.name: Retro Dance Party
angles.copy: Boogietown Festival is serving up classic disco and house vibes today! Time to hit the dance floor.

moments.title: Hebridean Celtic Festival Approaches
moments.blurb: The Hebridean Celtic Festival, celebrating Celtic and folk music, returns to Stornoway in the Outer Hebrides, Scotland, from July 15-18.

angles.name: Scottish Festival Fun
angles.copy: Ready for a trip to the Outer Hebrides? The Hebridean Celtic Festival kicks off next week! What artists are you hoping to catch?

angles.name: Celtic Music Vibes
angles.copy: The Hebridean Celtic Festival brings beautiful folk and traditional music to Scotland next week. Perfect for some relaxed summer listening.

moments.title: Love Island UK Continues
moments.blurb: The 13th season of Love Island UK premiered on June 1st and continues to air nightly (Sunday-Friday) at 9pm on ITV2 and ITVX.

angles.name: Villa Drama
angles.copy: Another week, another dose of Love Island drama! What's been your favourite moment from the villa so far this season?

angles.name: Who's Your Favourite Couple?
angles.copy: Love Island is heating up! Who are you rooting for to go all the way and win that £50k?

moments.title: Suzanne Vega's Birthday
moments.blurb: American singer-songwriter Suzanne Vega, known for hits like 'Luka' and 'Tom's Diner', turns 67 today.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Suzanne
angles.copy: Happy 67th Birthday to the iconic Suzanne Vega! What's your favourite track from her incredible discography?

moments.title: Lil' Kim's Birthday
moments.blurb: Influential American rapper Lil' Kim celebrates her 51st birthday today.

angles.name: Birthday Queen Bee
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 51st Birthday to the legendary Queen Bee herself, Lil' Kim! What's your favourite track?

moments.title: Derek Sanders' Birthday
moments.blurb: Derek Sanders, lead singer of American rock band Mayday Parade, turns 40 today.

angles.name: Mayday Parade Frontman
angles.copy: Happy 40th Birthday to Mayday Parade's frontman, Derek Sanders! What's your go-to Mayday Parade anthem?

moments.title: Deborah Cox's Birthday
moments.blurb: Canadian R&B singer Deborah Cox, known for her powerful vocals and hits like 'Nobody's Supposed to Be Here', celebrates her 52nd birthday on July 13th.

angles.name: R&B Diva Birthday
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate Deborah Cox's 52nd birthday on Monday! Her voice is pure R&B gold. What's your favourite of her ballads?

moments.title: Benny Benassi's Birthday
moments.blurb: Italian DJ and producer Benny Benassi, famous for the global hit 'Satisfaction', turns 59 on July 13th.

angles.name: DJ Legend's Birthday
angles.copy: Monday is Benny Benassi's 59th birthday! Still can't get enough of 'Satisfaction'. What's your favourite Benassi banger?

moments.title: Chris Cross' Birthday
moments.blurb: Chris Cross, the bass guitarist for the iconic British new wave band Ultravox, celebrates his 74th birthday on July 14th.

angles.name: Ultravox Bassist
angles.copy: Happy 74th Birthday to Ultravox's Chris Cross on Tuesday! What's your favourite synth-pop classic from the band?

moments.title: Dan Reynolds' Birthday
moments.blurb: Dan Reynolds, the charismatic lead singer of the American rock band Imagine Dragons, turns 39 on July 14th.

angles.name: Imagine Dragons Frontman
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 39th Birthday to Imagine Dragons' incredible frontman, Dan Reynolds, on Tuesday! What's your favourite anthem?

moments.title: Linda Ronstadt's Birthday
moments.blurb: American singer Linda Ronstadt, a versatile artist across rock, country, and pop, celebrates her 80th birthday on July 15th.

angles.name: Singing Legend
angles.copy: Happy 80th Birthday to the legendary Linda Ronstadt on Wednesday! Her voice is timeless. What's your favourite Linda track?

moments.title: Ray Toro's Birthday
moments.blurb: Ray Toro, the lead guitarist of the influential American rock band My Chemical Romance, turns 49 on July 15th.

angles.name: MCR Guitarist
angles.copy: Wednesday marks Ray Toro's 49th Birthday! The My Chemical Romance guitarist is a rock icon. What's your favourite MCR song?

moments.title: Luke Hemmings' Birthday
moments.blurb: Luke Hemmings, the lead vocalist and rhythm guitarist of the Australian pop-rock band 5 Seconds of Summer, turns 30 on July 16th.

angles.name: 5SOS Frontman
angles.copy: Happy 30th Birthday to 5 Seconds of Summer's Luke Hemmings on Thursday! What's your favourite 5SOS track to sing along to?

moments.title: Fatboy Slim's Birthday
moments.blurb: Norman Cook, better known as the pioneering British DJ and producer Fatboy Slim, celebrates his 63rd birthday on July 16th.

angles.name: Big Beat Birthday
angles.copy: Thursday is Fatboy Slim's 63rd Birthday! The Brighton legend still knows how to rock a party. What's your favourite of his tracks?

moments.title: Geezer Butler's Birthday
moments.blurb: Terence 'Geezer' Butler, the legendary bassist and primary lyricist for Black Sabbath, turns 77 on July 17th.

angles.name: Heavy Metal Icon
angles.copy: Happy 77th Birthday to Black Sabbath's Geezer Butler on Friday! A true pioneer of heavy metal bass. What's your favourite Sabbath riff?

moments.title: Tom Fletcher's Birthday
moments.blurb: Tom Fletcher, the lead vocalist and guitarist for the popular British pop-rock band McFly, celebrates his 41st birthday on July 17th.

angles.name: McFly Star
angles.copy: Friday is McFly's Tom Fletcher's 41st Birthday! What's your go-to McFly singalong track?

moments.title: Martha Reeves' Birthday
moments.blurb: Martha Reeves, the iconic lead singer of the Motown group Martha Reeves and the Vandellas, turns 85 on July 18th.

angles.name: Motown Legend
angles.copy: Happy 85th Birthday to the legendary Martha Reeves on Saturday! 'Dancing In The Street' never gets old. What's your favourite Vandellas hit?

moments.title: Dion DiMucci's Birthday
moments.blurb: American rock and roll pioneer Dion DiMucci, known for hits like 'Runaround Sue' and 'The Wanderer', turns 87 on July 18th.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Pioneer
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 87th Birthday to the incredible Dion DiMucci on Saturday! A true rock 'n' roll legend.

moments.title: M.I.A.'s Birthday
moments.blurb: British rapper, singer, and songwriter M.I.A. (Mathangi Arulpragasam), known for her genre-bending music, turns 51 on July 18th.

angles.name: Innovative Artist
angles.copy: Happy 51st Birthday to the incredible M.I.A. on Saturday! Her music always pushes boundaries. What's your favourite track?

moments.title: Julianne Hough's Birthday
moments.blurb: American dancer, singer, and actress Julianne Hough, known from 'Dancing with the Stars' and her country music career, turns 38 on July 20th.

angles.name: Dancing Queen's Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 38th Birthday to the multi-talented Julianne Hough on Monday! What's your favourite of her songs or dances?

moments.title: Cat Stevens (Yusuf Islam) Birthday
moments.blurb: British singer-songwriter Cat Stevens, also known as Yusuf Islam, celebrates his 78th birthday on July 21st.

angles.name: Timeless Troubadour
angles.copy: Happy 78th Birthday to the iconic Cat Stevens (Yusuf Islam) on Tuesday! His songs are truly timeless. What's your favourite?

moments.title: Paloma Faith's Birthday
moments.blurb: British singer-songwriter and actress Paloma Faith turns 41 on July 21st.

angles.name: British Soul Star
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 41st Birthday to the fabulous Paloma Faith on Tuesday! What's your favourite track from her?

moments.title: Rebecca Ferguson's Birthday
moments.blurb: British singer-songwriter Rebecca Ferguson, who rose to fame on The X Factor, turns 40 on July 21st.

angles.name: X Factor Star
angles.copy: Happy 40th Birthday to the amazing Rebecca Ferguson on Tuesday! What's your favourite song from her soulful voice?
